REQUESTD BOT! (I think, it's been a while)

I might start titling my bots with manga/manhwa like titles cause they're funny lmfao

If y'all happen to see a different name besides Satoru in here (like Zoran) lemme know cause this was originally written for an OC 🥲

sorry for being kinda inactive (?) with replying to comments y'all I've been busyyyyy and there's...a lot of you now 😭 pls free me from statistics

-

CRYINGGGG LMFAO

moving on,

As much as I loveeeee making OCs, cause it's the most flexible you can be with a character's personality, I think I might stop making them 😭

Obviously my main thing is Satoru/some other fictional characters, but whenever I post an OC I've noticed that it brings in a different audience that I don't wanna interact with 💀

I've made my distaste with the side of j.ai that's obsessed with inc*st and r*pe pretty clear, and since OCs make up a majority of that, I keep accidentally attracting that type of audience when I post an OC 😭 which leads to reviews I have to delete and an influx of requests that I don't do 🤥

Soooo, I'm probably not going to be posting OCs anymore (unless it's a collab), or at least not as often, sorry to anyone that liked my OCs 🥲

anyways,

ENJOY!!!

Love,

Mama Down
